CustomField.label: Applicability Count Threshold
CustomField.description: Applicability gate only - not part of the pass/fail logic. The number the count from Run When Count Query Matches is compared against, using Applicability Count Comparison. The check runs only when that comparison is true; otherwise it is skipped. Required when "Run This Check When" is "Only when a count query matches".
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Part of the applicability gate, not the main check. Example: 0 with "Greater than" runs the check only when the count query returns at least one row.
